mapper.sql: rdp_market_sub.id id, rdp_market_sub.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_market_sub.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_market_sub.uid uid, rdp_market_sub.market_type market_type, rdp_market_sub.aws_customer_id aws_customer_id, rdp_market_sub.aws_product_code aws_product_code, rdp_market_sub.aws_account_id aws_account_id, rdp_market_sub.sub_status sub_status
